title: Energizing Freshly Juicy Chestnut Mushroom Stir-fry
description: This fresh and energizing Turkish dish features freshly picked chestnut mushrooms simmered with a dash of spices for an easy meal thats perfect for breakfast.
instructions: Heat a large pan with olive oil over medium heat.
Add scallions and minced garlic, sauté until fragrant.
Fold in tomato paste to create a glossy texture.
Gradually add water or vegetable stock, stirring continuously to prevent sticking.
Once the liquid has reduced slightly and the sauce is thickened, gently fold in chestnut mushrooms.
Cook for another minute until the mushrooms are tender and fully infused with the flavors.
